scope_summary: Fresh verifier for the backend/API-only diagnostic draft/submission foundation for Q0, SA1-SA3 and Q1-Q3 under employee profile-session bearer auth. Full MVP-07.01, MVP-07.04, MVP-07, MVP stage and human gates remain open.

commands.cmd: rg prohibited final-scoring/sensitive response fields in diagnostic production/OpenAPI/generated files

findings.title: POST /api/v1/diagnostics/me/submit does not satisfy the safe-handoff-only response contract.
evidence: .agent/stages/mvp/sprint_contract.md requires submit to return safe handoff fields only: routePreview=true, recommendedFirstLessonId=N1 and submitted state/timestamps.
docs/architecture/access-and-subscriptions.md:258 says submit response may expose only routePreview=true, recommendedFirstLessonId=N1, state and timestamps.

apps/api/src/main/java/com/finrhythm/api/diagnostic/web/DiagnosticAttemptController.java:121 returns toResponse(diagnosticAttemptService.submit(...)); the shared toResponse method includes employeeRegistrationId, tenantId, pilotLaunchId, accessPoolId, allowedAnswerIds, q0, selfAssessment and routingAnswers at lines 130-156.

packages/api-client/openapi/finrhythm-api.openapi.json exposes the submit 200 response as DiagnosticAttemptResponse; verifier raw openapi-diagnostic-surface.txt shows that schema contains accessPoolId, allowedAnswerIds, attemptId, employeeRegistrationId, pilotLaunchId, q0, routingAnswers, selfAssessment and tenantId in addition to the safe handoff fields.
findings.impact: The scoped API behavior, OpenAPI snapshot, generated client and canonical docs are internally inconsistent with the sprint acceptance wording. The current tests only prove absence of final scoring/HR/points fields, not the stricter handoff-only response boundary.
findings.minimal_required_fix: Either implement a dedicated submit response DTO/schema/client contract limited to state, routePreview, recommendedFirstLessonId and timestamps, with focused tests proving no answer/scope echo on submit, or explicitly revise the frozen contract/canonical docs to allow the full attempt echo and then refresh evidence with fresh verification.

findings.title: Independent command evidence passed.
evidence: Focused DiagnosticAttemptControllerIT passed with Flyway v011 applied.
api-client generated check, OpenAPI drift check and typecheck passed.
JSON validation and git diff whitespace check passed.

findings.title: No browser evidence is required for this scoped backend/API-only slice.
evidence: .agent/stages/mvp/sprint_contract.md marks UI integration and browser screenshots out of scope.

findings.title: Full MVP-07 and human gates remain open.
evidence: .agent/stages/mvp/backlog.md keeps MVP-07.01, MVP-07.04 and MVP-07 open.

human_gates_open: Final financial correctness of diagnostic questions and explanations
Legal/privacy boundaries and real employee/customer data processing approval
Admin/support production access policy for sensitive diagnostic data
Design/accessibility QA on real mobile screens for later UI integration
notes: Verifier wrote only immutable verifier artifacts and raw verifier outputs for this contract.
No production code, tests, generated client files, canonical docs, sprint contract, evidence aliases, status, backlog, progress, feature_list or publish_manifest were edited by this verifier.
Product docs remain unchanged in the current worktree, which matches the contract expectation for this backend/API-only slice.
